title: Gaza Northern Corridor — Displaced Families Emergency Relief
story: My family and seventeen neighboring households were forcibly displaced from Beit Lahiya in January 2026 following the collapse of the ceasefire. We are sheltering in a UNRWA-supported site near Deir al-Balah with no access to clean water, medicine, or consistent food. Every shekel raised will be distributed directly as cash assistance to documented families on our verified list. I am the elected representative of our displaced group and have been coordinating with local relief volunteers since February.
vouching_narrative: The campaign organizer, Yusuf Al-Rashidi, was nominated as the group's spokesperson by seventeen co-displaced families from the Beit Lahiya area. His role is attested by a statement from the Deir al-Balah Emergency Coordination Committee. However, no independent financial institution verification has been provided, and the bank account designated for fund receipt is registered under a different individual with no stated relationship to the organizer or the beneficiary group.
